tutorial.welcomeDesc: Your student life is about to level up. Complete daily missions, earn XP, and build streaks to become the best version of yourself.
tutorial.missionsDesc: Every day you get fresh missions across Study, Exercise, Social, Creative, and Wellness categories. Difficulty scales gently as you grow stronger.
tutorial.streaksDesc: Complete missions daily to build your streak. Hit milestones at 7, 30, and 100 days to unlock achievement badges and bragging rights!
tutorial.aiDesc: QuestUp AI is your personal coach, study helper, planner, and cheerleader. Ask it anything — from study tips to workout ideas!

ai.title: QuestUp AI
ai.greeting: Hey! I'm your QuestUp AI. Try asking me something!
